seo.title: Cedar Tutoring Academy | Personalized K–12 Tutoring in Plano, TX
seo.description: Personalized tutoring in reading, math, writing, science, Arabic, homework help, and test prep with flexible scheduling and progress parents can see.

hero.eyebrow: Plano, TX • K–12 tutoring & test prep
hero.heading: Build skills, confidence, and results with tutoring that feels personal.
hero.subtitle: Personalized support in reading, math, writing, science, Arabic, homework help, and test prep — with caring teachers, flexible scheduling, and progress parents can actually see.

programsSection.heading: Academic support designed for clarity, confidence, and steady progress.
programsSection.subtitle: Explore the programs families use most often to close gaps, reduce stress, and build momentum.

testimonialsSection.heading: What families notice most: calmer routines, clearer progress, and growing confidence.
testimonialsSection.subtitle: Real stories from families who found steady support, clearer communication, and learning that feels more manageable at home.

howItWorks.heading: A straightforward process for getting the right support in place.

steps.title: Free assessment
steps.description: We learn where your child is now, what feels hard, and what goals matter most to your family.

steps.title: Custom plan
steps.description: We recommend the right program, schedule, and level of support based on actual needs — not a generic package.

steps.title: Targeted tutoring
steps.description: Students get focused instruction, consistent encouragement, and practical strategies they can apply right away.

steps.title: Progress reviews
steps.description: Parents stay informed through thoughtful updates, visible wins, and clear next-step recommendations.

whyCedar.heading: The value parents care about most, presented simply.
whyCedar.subtitle: Cedar combines academic support, thoughtful communication, and practical family logistics.

items.title: Trust-heavy experience
items.description: Parents are choosing Cedar with real stakes in mind. The brand should feel calm, credible, and serious without losing warmth.

items.title: Small-group attention
items.description: The 1:3 student-tutor ratio keeps instruction personal, attentive, and more responsive to actual learning gaps.
checks: More feedback, less blending into the crowd
Ideal for both catch-up and staying on track

items.title: Progress parents can see
items.description: Assessment-led planning and progress reviews make Cedar feel like a measurable academic partner, not just extra time after school.
checks: Custom plans based on real needs
Updates focused on growth and next steps

items.title: Family-friendly logistics
items.description: Flexible scheduling and transportation make Cedar easier to fit into real life — a major differentiator parents remember.
checks: Transportation support within the service radius

finalCta.heading: Ready to find the right support for your child?
finalCta.subtext: Book a free assessment to identify learning gaps, match the right program, and plan clear next steps with confidence.
